# About Example Co

Founded in 2024, Example Co builds AI-native tools for knowledge workers. Distributed team across London, Lagos, and San Francisco.

## Mission

Make every team's collective intelligence searchable, connected, and actionable. Institutional knowledge is the most under-leveraged asset in modern organizations.

## Team & Backing

Founding team with experience in enterprise search, developer tooling, and applied AI research. Backed by Seedcamp and angel investors from the knowledge management space.
